name: Fuse.System

simple_types.name: Error_Type
simple_types.code:
type Error_Type is (EXIT_SUCCESS, EPERM, ENOENT, ESRCH, EINTR, EIO,
   ENXIO, E2BIG, …, EHWPOISON);

simple_types.name: RW_Type
simple_types.code:
type RW_Type is
   (O_RDONLY, O_WRONLY, O_RDWR, O_ACCMODE);

record_types.name: Context_Type
File_Info_Type
Flags_Type
St_Mode_Type
Stat_Type

fields.name: St_Nlink
fields.description: number of links to the file

fields.name: St_Rdev
fields.description: device ID (if file is character or block special)

fields.name: St_Size
fields.description: file size in bytes (if file is a regular file)

fields.name: St_Blksize
fields.description:
a filesystem-specific preferred I/O block size for this object.
In some filesystem types, this may vary from file to file

fields.name: St_Blocks
fields.description: number of blocks allocated for this object

access_types.name: Context_Access
access_types.code: type Context_Access is access all Context_Type;

access_types.code: type UTimeBuffer_Access is access all UTimeBuffer_Type;

constants.name: EDEADLOCK
constants.code: EDEADLOCK   : constant Error_Type := EDEADLK;

constants.name: EWOULDBLOCK
constants.code: EWOULDBLOCK : constant Error_Type := EAGAIN;

constants.name: Null_Stat
constants.code:
Null_Stat : constant Stat_Type :=
  (St_Dev => 0,
   St_Ino => 0,
   St_Mode => (others => False),
   St_Nlink => 0,
   St_Uid => 0,
   St_Gid => 0,
   St_Rdev => 0,
   St_Size => 0,
   St_Atime => 0,
   St_Mtime => 0,
   St_Ctime => 0,
   St_Blksize => 0,
   St_Blocks => 0);

constants.name: S_IFBLK
constants.code:
S_IFBLK: constant St_Mode_Type :=
  (S_IFCHR | S_IFDIR => true, others => false);
